title: cocculus malabaricus
intro: Cocculus malabaricus, also known as the Indian berry or snake berry, is a tropical plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being an anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Cocculus malabaricus include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome, and aiding in the treatment of fever and other ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
